{"key_event":"Total war mobilization and Union sacrée","reasoning":"Republican administration was already strong, but conscription, emergency rule, censorship, and wartime dirigisme pushed France into near-overwhelming state penetration of economy and society. Civil society retained unions, socialist organization, strikes, mutinies, and parliamentary traditions, yet mass casualties, occupation, censorship, and wartime unity materially narrowed its autonomy by 1918.","society_change":-1.0,"society_power":7.6,"state_change":0.6,"state_power":9.4}
